documentation.text:
@title  TaxeeExecutor
 @notice Atomic execution contract for taxee harvest + USYC park operations.
         When the taxee agent decides to park capital in USYC (while waiting for:
           a) a wash-sale window to close, or
           b) a lot to cross the 365-day long-term threshold),
         this contract atomically moves USDC into USYC in a single transaction.
         "Atomic" is the key word: both the USDC transfer and the USYC deposit
         succeed together, or both revert. No partial execution.
         Also records every park/redeem against the TaxeeLotRegistry for
         non-repudiable on-chain audit.
 @dev    Deployed on Base. Authorized caller = Circle Programmable Wallet address
         for the user's taxee agent (set at construction, immutable).
         USYC address on Base must be confirmed before mainnet deploy.

@notice The only address permitted to call park/redeem functions.
         Set to the Circle Programmable Wallet address at construction.
@notice Emitted when USDC is successfully parked into USYC for a lot.
@notice Emitted when USYC shares are redeemed back to USDC.

@notice Tracks USYC share balances per lot (lotId → shares).
         Allows partial redemptions and precise accounting per lot.
@notice Tracks the agent address that parked each lot.

@notice Redeem ALL parked shares for a lot in one call.
         Used when a lot fully crosses the LT threshold and is ready for harvest.
@notice Preview current USDC value of shares parked for a lot (reflects NAV appreciation).
@notice Return parked share balance for a lot.

@title  TaxeeLotRegistry
 @notice Immutable on-chain registry of tax lot disposal commitments.
         Every time taxee executes a disposal (harvest or rebalance), the backend
         calls `commitDisposal` to stamp a keccak256 hash of the full Arc record
         (lot ID, cost basis, proceeds, gain/loss, timestamp) onto Base.
         This gives users a non-repudiable, publicly verifiable anchor for their
         Form 8949 data — the Arc off-chain ledger is the source of truth, and
         the onchain hash proves it has not been altered after the fact.
 @dev    Deployed on Base (primary execution chain).
         Called by the taxee execution layer (Circle Programmable Wallet authorized caller).
         Each lot ID can only be committed once — disposals are permanent.
@notice Maps lotId → committed data hash. Zero value = not yet committed.
@notice Maps lotId → committing agent address.
@notice Maps lotId → block number of commitment (for indexing + audit).
@notice Total number of disposal commitments recorded.
@notice Check whether a lot has been committed.
@notice Return full commitment details for a lot.
@notice Delegation registry contract
@notice Circle Wallets API endpoint (off-chain oracle/relayer)
@notice Contract owner
@notice Authorized executors (Taxee backend nodes)
@notice Allowed assets for trading
@notice USYC (Circle Yield Token) address
@notice Cooldown between harvest and rebuy (in seconds)
@notice Slippage tolerance (basis points, 100 = 1%)
@notice Last harvest timestamp per user (for cooldown)
@notice Pending executions
@notice Request nonce counter
@notice Check if an action can be executed
@notice Get pending execution details

@notice Policy limits structure

Authorized caller = Circle Programmable Wallet address         for the user's taxee agent (set at construction, immutable).         USYC address on Base must be confirmed before mainnet deploy.","kind":"dev","methods":{"constructor":{"params":{"_authorizedCaller":"Circle Programmable Wallet address for this agent","_registry":"TaxeeLotRegistry address","_usdc":"USDC token address on Base (0x833589fCD6eDb6E08f4cEAA5e9...)","_usyc":"USYC token address on Base"}},"parkInUsyc(uint256,bytes32,address)":{"params":{"agentAddr":"Agent address (for event indexing and registry)","lotId":"Taxee lot identifier (keccak256 of lot UUID + agentId)","usdcAmount":"Amount of USDC to park (must be pre-approved to this contract)"},"returns":{"shares":"     USYC shares received"}},"redeemFromUsyc(uint256,bytes32,address)":{"params":{"lotId":"Lot identifier","recipient":"Address to send USDC proceeds to (usually the agent wallet)","shares":"USYC shares to redeem for this lot"},"returns":{"usdcAmount":" USDC received"}}},"title":"TaxeeExecutor","version":1},"userdoc":{"events":{"ParkedInUsyc(address,bytes32,uint256,uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"Emitted when USDC is successfully parked into USYC for a lot."},"RedeemedFromUsyc(address,bytes32,uint256,uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"Emitted when USYC shares are redeemed back to USDC."}},"kind":"user","methods":{"authorizedCaller()":{"notice":"The only address permitted to call park/redeem functions.         Set to the Circle Programmable Wallet address at construction."},"getParkedShares(bytes32)":{"notice":"Return parked share balance for a lot."},"parkInUsyc(uint256,bytes32,address)":{"notice":"Park USDC into USYC for a specific tax lot.         Called by the taxee agent when:         - A lot is within `maturationBufferDays` of the 365-day LT threshold, OR         - A harvest is deferred due to an open wash-sale window and the agent           parks the capital to earn yield in the interim."},"parkedBy(bytes32)":{"notice":"Tracks the agent address that parked each lot."},"parkedShares(bytes32)":{"notice":"Tracks USYC share balances per lot (lotId \u2192 shares).         Allows partial redemptions and precise accounting per lot."},"previewParkedValue(bytes32)":{"notice":"Preview current USDC value of shares parked for a lot (reflects NAV appreciation)."},"redeemAllForLot(bytes32,address)":{"notice":"Redeem ALL parked shares for a lot in one call.         Used when a lot fully crosses the LT threshold and is ready for harvest."},"redeemFromUsyc(uint256,bytes32,address)":{"notice":"Redeem USYC shares back to USDC when a lot is ready to harvest         (wash-sale window closed or LT threshold crossed)."}},"notice":"Atomic execution contract for taxee harvest + USYC park operations.         When the taxee agent decides to park capital in USYC (while waiting for:           a) a wash-sale window to close, or           b) a lot to cross the 365-day long-term threshold),         this contract atomically moves USDC into USYC in a single transaction.         \"Atomic\" is the key word: both the USDC transfer and the USYC deposit         succeed together, or both revert. No partial execution.         Also records every park/redeem against the TaxeeLotRegistry for         non-repudiable on-chain audit.","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"contracts/src/TaxeeExecutor.sol":"TaxeeExecutor"},"evmVersion":"paris","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":200},"remappings":[]},"sources":{"contracts/src/TaxeeExecutor.sol":{"keccak256":"0x4fcea1711a74bed3b02e518f3b1d53c0e6f3bc1091814a6119c15ba78c46ddeb","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://ef24be85f911f0b6feff09f99d3d06c3d16318ff2141ffef5ebcda985e12522b","dweb:/ipfs/QmNnyVxSCRRn8PqCJjz21Na1EqwxaxtEsMh6nRumMi2tQE"]},"contracts/src/TaxeeLotRegistry.sol":{"keccak256":"0x5f5fa04c1b953f43900ed25e1cd0c251d01ffdd698a5ee8e9e92063d14ada64a","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://ac7f81c72a96de04df419d753726b3fa045f0389d92b8387eba528055a0540e5","dweb:/ipfs/QmWSTYxv7bxKnRNwto4Sh45fTUMruAbEjcQNyH95WgMLJi"]},"contracts/src/interfaces/IERC20.sol":{"keccak256":"0xd2b45e78d989ee0349cef54393f561fc629ab5a2099e6e1b27575021d44f59a3","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://613ff338196200f644f9269c6aa51cc36be7329a658bf0d7bbbb2a4e48ad9eda","dweb:/ipfs/QmTMKS4yBFk6VXPDDeg7HeeAFsuPXxs1Mez3SDUXxdRCjS"]},"contracts/src/interfaces/IUsyc.sol":{"keccak256":"0x08527af279c584d2dc5f9ecf1bfe87c33151fc933dea55b7358f3b3a1ba487c7","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://b741c0168e8aa0914b87752bf7c3f3d684902d099038010455ec9a421fcfe71e","dweb:/ipfs/Qmb1tFxUKYQSXYELx1WSvMJzpGG9iVqFtmpLfsAB2PsdLi"]}},"version":1}
